blockingIssues.description: Feature handoff cites commit cd9cde7, but that commit does not include the parser change in crates/h7cad-native-dwg/src/file_header.rs, so the implementation lacks auditable commit provenance.

orchestratorOverride.reason: The validator failure is limited to commit provenance in a user-approved shared dirty workspace, while cargo validators passed and the audit-fix feature confirmed behavior plus test-name clarity. The attempted audit-fix could not produce an isolated feature-only commit because the same test file already contains interleaved pre-existing file-structure edits. The milestone proceeds with this explicit audit trail rather than blocking parser progress on workspace hygiene.
deferredWork: If a clean worktree is created later, re-run file-structure audit/provenance cleanup there instead of in the current shared workspace.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document a valid success/handoff path for shared dirty workspaces when isolated feature-only commits are unsafe, instead of requiring workers to reuse unrelated commit IDs.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The review for dwg-parser-header-error-contract failed because EndFeatureRun required a commitId and the worker reported cd9cde7 even though that commit only changed tests, not the parser implementation in src/file_header.rs.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Allow an explicit already-implemented verification path when a feature is already present in the shared worktree, instead of always requiring test-first code edits.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The section-map feature review passed but recorded a skill deviation because the current skill assumes test-first implementation work even when the feature had already landed in the shared dirty worktree.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify fixture-worker scope boundaries so fixture features do not also absorb pending-graph/dispatch assertions unless the mission explicitly asks for cross-milestone coverage.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The fixture feature review found read_headers.rs additions for pending_document_preserves_section_directory_entries and dispatch_entry_points_follow_pending_object_kind even though the feature description was limited to file-structure fixture foundation.
